texto: We, the weird and sideways folk, have always walked the line of rejection. It's what makes us visionaries. We who are pushed away, to the edge, can see beyond the borders of reality. We frighten the privileged with our possibility.
explicacao: Citação de G.L. Carriger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We, the weird and sideways folk, have always walked the line of rejection. It's what makes us vis…” articula reflexao, lgbt, weird em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
